name: ASUS PRIME B550-PLUS AC-HES ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4866(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 3 x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - DisplayPort - HDMI - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - Realtek GbE LAN - Dual band WiFi 5
shortName: ASUS PRIME B550-PLUS AC-HES ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: ATX motherboard for AMD AM4 socket with B550 chipset, DDR4 support, and Wi-Fi 5 for mid-range builds.
